subcodes.first_line: O thou who art captivated by the truth and magnetized by the Heavenly Kingdom! Thy long letter hath come and it brought great joy
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای مفتون حقیقت و منجذب ملکوت الله نامه مفصل رسید و از تلاوتش نهایت سرور حاصل
subcodes.subjects: @progressive revelation; renewal of religion, @language and the structure of reality, @unity; oneness of humanity, @Manifestation of God as divine physician, @spiritual transformation
